title: Diagnosis: Room 101
description:
You wake up alone in a hospital room. The place seems abandoned, but something feels wrong. The hallways are empty, the lights flicker, and strange sounds echo in the distance. As you explore the hospital, you will find notes and records that reveal fragments of a disturbing story.

Find hidden notes and uncover the disturbing story behind the events that took place.

Search for keys scattered throughout the hospital to unlock new rooms and discover the secrets hidden behind every door.

 

Each discovery brings you closer to the truth about the events that turned this place into a nightmare.

 

But some doors should remain closed.
description_short: Diagnosis Room 101 is a short horror game and a first-person psychological horror experience, focused on exploration, atmosphere, and uncovering a hidden story through documents and environmental clues scattered throughout the hospital.
